title: DeepSeek V4 Analysis..
summary: Caleb analyzes DeepSeek V4, highlighting its major reduction in inference compute and cost compared to prior models. The analysis frames V4 as a significant development in the competitive dynamics between open-source and closed commercial AI labs, driven by different national incentives for AI development.
